data.title: As a team member not involved in authoring, I can verify all documentation links resolve and follow the complete path from root README to /dso:onboarding without needing additional context
data.description:
## Description

**What**: A validation pass over all documentation created and modified by this epic -- automated link checking and a human walkthrough to confirm the documentation is accurate, readable, and followable.
**Why**: Documentation accuracy degrades when written without verification. This story ensures all hyperlinks work, all steps are followable, and a person unfamiliar with the authoring process can complete the onboarding path.
**Scope**:
- IN: Automated link check on all edited/added documentation (root README.md, INSTALL.md, CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md additions); team member walkthrough of root README to INSTALL.md to /dso:onboarding entry point; fix any broken links or unclear steps found during validation
- OUT: Implementing new features; rewriting documentation beyond fixing issues found during validation

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, all hyperlinks in edited and added documentation resolve without error -- an automated link check confirms zero 404/5xx responses for all URLs in root README.md, INSTALL.md, and CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md additions
  <- Satisfies: "All hyperlinks in edited and added documentation resolve without error"
- When this story is complete, a team member not involved in authoring has walked through root README and INSTALL.md and confirmed the steps are followable to the /dso:onboarding entry point without needing additional context
  <- Satisfies: "A team member not involved in authoring confirms the steps are followable"

## Considerations

- [Reliability] Link check must verify these external URLs: https://brew.sh/, Atlassian API token guide, Figma PAT guide, https://code.claude.com/docs/en/plugin-marketplaces
- [Reliability] Any broken links or unclear steps found during validation must be fixed before this story closes -- this story is the final quality gate for the epic

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue -- one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.
